title: Extreme high-volume reference lab — sensitivity and formatting stress
description: Mega-reference lab at extreme-high-volume (5M slides/yr, 220 pathologist FTE, 60 scanners). Tests Monte Carlo runtime with a large ledger, sensitivity analysis at extreme magnitudes, and dashboard large-number formatting (B / T thresholds).

comparative.dpa_coverage: missing — DPA not designed for mega-scale
